--- Menu Page: http://www.drbombays.com/menu ---
Dr. Bombay's underwater tea party
High Tea
We serve delicious vegetarian plates, pastries, coffee, and a large selection of teas.
What is High Tea?
Looking for a special experience?
Treat yourself to a
High Tea!
Join us for a delightful afternoon, sipping
hot tea
paired with a delicious assortment of
sandwiches, quiche, cakes, and baked delights
, all elegantly presented on a
vintage china tiered tray
.
Immerse yourself in the
whimsical, eclectic charm
of our inviting tea house, where every detail is designed to create a warm and memorable experience—one that will stay with you long after the last sip.
Reserve your High Tea today!
If you are interested in reserving the entire room for a private party please email us to book the entire space. Your total bill is required upon booking. We do not accept credit card payments by phone.  Cost applies to all  guests including children.
Parking *
We have moved! Dr. Bombay's is located at 753 Cherokee Ave. SE   in Atlanta across from Zoo Atlanta .  Free, on-street parking is available around the Grant Park neighboorhood.
Liability *
You must be at least 21 years of age to sign a reservation agreement.  The person who signs the reservation agreement must be present at the time of the event.  All children under the age of 14 must be accompanied by an adult.  Dr. Bombay's is not responsible for any lost, stolen or damaged personal items.
Please read our complete  Dr. Bombay’s High Tea reservation contract
here
before booking.
We Brew Scholars
Stay up to date with our social impact mission, our monthly benefit dinner, and news from Dr. Bombay’s.
Subscribe
We respect your privacy.
Thank you!
